title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Orochi, Wano Citizens, Kaido, Kid, Oden as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My old man broke the law and was made to commit seppuku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My family should have fallen back then!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Those are Kurozumi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But the ones who remained...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Got chased down by Vigilantes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were beaten and thrown into rivers!! They were killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was an idiot, too scared to sleep!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even though the one who committed the crime was dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's the son of the Daimyo murderer....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he bore the name of Kurozumi, then even a kid was treated like a criminal!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: That's why all the people of Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: deserve punishment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what they have done to us all this time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then, what was found in the back room...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: were the offerings to Kaido!! Countless weapons...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: and hundreds of kidnapped people!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For selling, to have fun, or just to kill them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once they are brought there, their lives are over.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Lord Oden was infuriated!! But...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Orochi made a proposal.

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Do you want to stop the kidnappings?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you go to war with us, you shall lose.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy never had any interest in the country, they just wanted revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone could see that victory was not the only thing at stake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why Lord Open accepted his pro- posed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every week at an agreed time, he would dance naked as a sign of apology towards the Kurozumi family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: even though he lost every- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He continued dancing because each time he did, he saved 100 lives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He believed in their promise that they'd leave the country after 5 years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: After the shipbuilding was completed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Amenage government

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the while, visiting every town each week to see if there were any changes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He continued to protect this country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He took it all upon himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So who's the idiot Lord?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I dare you to repeat it!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
